title: woodsia fragilis
intro: Woodsia fragilis, also known as the fragile woodsia or fragile cliff fern, is a type of small fern native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits are said to include the ability to calm digestive issues, boost the immune system, and even treat conditions such as arthritis and gout. Woodsia fragilis is often prepared as a tea or tincture, with herbalists recommending infusions of the plant's leaves and stems for its medicinal properties.
